humanRoles.title: Executive Sponsor
humanRoles.purpose: Sets direction, sponsors the change, clears blockers, and aligns the effort to measurable business value.

humanRoles.title: Business / Product Owner
humanRoles.purpose: Defines outcomes, prioritizes capabilities, and validates whether the solution meets business intent.

humanRoles.title: Domain Architect
humanRoles.purpose: Shapes domain boundaries, modernization patterns, and architectural guardrails that guide both humans and agents.

humanRoles.title: Platform Engineer
humanRoles.purpose: Builds the technical substrate for agentic delivery, including workflows, environments, access controls, and telemetry.

humanRoles.title: Security / Compliance Lead
humanRoles.purpose: Ensures that governance requirements are translated into actionable controls and verified over time.

humanRoles.title: SRE / Operations Lead
humanRoles.purpose: Ensures the system can be run safely, observed clearly, and improved through operational feedback.

humanRoles.title: Enablement Lead
humanRoles.purpose: Transfers knowledge, shapes training, and helps the organization adopt new human-agent ways of working.

agentRoles.title: Coordinator Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Orchestrates specialist agents, manages workflow state, and routes work based on defined goals and boundaries.

agentRoles.title: Planning Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Transforms goals and requirements into structured briefs, task breakdowns, and execution plans.

agentRoles.title: Implementation Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Produces and refines code, configuration, and documentation under constrained instructions and review expectations.

agentRoles.title: Testing Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Generates and executes tests, validates expected behavior, and surfaces issues with evidence.

agentRoles.title: Security Review Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Applies policy checks, scans outputs, and identifies security or compliance concerns before changes move forward.

agentRoles.title: SRE Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Monitors health, interprets signals, and proposes or executes low-risk operational responses within approved limits.

agentRoles.title: Documentation Agent
agentRoles.purpose: Packages outputs into understandable artifacts for delivery, audit, enablement, and handoff.
